hero.description: Connect with trusted affiliates and top brands in one powerful network. Increase your revenue, expand your reach, and build partnerships that deliver long-term success.

home.trustedBySubtext: Earnytics trusted by thousands of brands globally.
home.advertisersDesc: Scale your brand with quality traffic. Earnytics connects advertisers with vetted publishers and creators to drive sales, leads and awareness through performance-based partnerships.
home.publishersDesc: Earnytics partners with leading networks so publishers and creators can maximize revenue from commerce traffic. Get access to thousands of offers, real-time tracking and reliable payouts.
home.impactDesc: From premium brands to high-performing publishers, our platform powers global partnerships. Leverage live insights, track performance, and grow your business with measurable results every single day.
home.trustedDesc: In partnership with leading global brands to drive real success.
home.joinThousands: Become part of a powerful affiliate platform where advertisers, publishers, and creators work together to grow audiences, drive performance, and create new earning opportunities.
home.contentShowcaseLead: Editorial, deals, and vertical publishers partner with Earnytics to turn qualified traffic into measurable revenue.
home.contentShowcaseBlurb1Desc: Reach readers who browse with intent—reviews, roundups, and seasonal guides—then match them with campaigns that fit your voice.
home.contentShowcaseBlurb2Desc: Track clicks, conversions, and earnings in real time so you can optimize placements and grow what already works.
home.contentShowcaseBlurb3Desc: One network connects your site to vetted advertisers across categories—without juggling dozens of separate programs.
home.ourAdvantagesCard1: Integrated Access to Influencers & Content sites
home.ourAdvantagesCard2: Tailored Campaign Strategies for Better Outcomes
home.ourAdvantagesCard3: Clear Metrics for Transparent, Actionable Insights
home.howEarnyticsWorksSubtext: Gear up your affiliate life with Earnytics' performance network.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForSubtext: Earnytics helps brands and partners grow through affiliate campaigns across multiple traffic and marketing channels.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForCard1Desc: Earn through high-converting campaigns that match your audience. Earnytics helps bloggers, review sites, and editorial publishers connect with trusted brands, track performance, and maximize revenue.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForCard2Desc: Promote exclusive offers and high-converting deals from trusted brands. Earnytics helps coupon and deal sites access quality campaigns, track performance, and maximize affiliate earnings.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForCard3Desc: Partner with trusted brands and monetize your audience through high-converting campaigns. Earnytics helps influencers discover relevant offers, track performance, and grow affiliate revenue across social channels.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForCard4Desc: Promote high-converting offers through targeted campaigns and monetize your subscriber base. Earnytics helps email marketers access trusted brands, track results, and grow recurring affiliate revenue.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForCard5Desc: Monetize your audience with high-converting campaigns across social platforms. Earnytics helps social publishers and creators connect with trusted brands, track performance, and grow affiliate revenue.
home.whoIsEarnyticsForCard6Desc: Promote relevant, high-converting offers that match buyer intent. Earnytics helps review and comparison sites connect with trusted brands, track conversions, and maximize affiliate revenue.

influencersPage.heroDesc: Partner with trusted brands and monetize your audience through high-converting campaigns. Discover relevant offers, track performance, and grow affiliate revenue across social channels.

lifestyle.headline: Lifestyle creators weave brands into daily routines—from home to travel.

travel.headline: Travel storytellers inspire bookings and gear—with authentic on-the-road moments.

deals.headline: Deals creators spotlight savings audiences act on—coupons, promos, and limited drops.

influencersPage.whyCard1Desc: Dedicated help with tracking links, compliance, and campaign setup so you can focus on content—not admin.
influencersPage.whyCard2Desc: Vetted advertisers and high-converting programs across retail, SaaS, and lifestyle so your audience sees real value.
influencersPage.whyCard3Desc: Promote on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, blogs, or email. Use the channels that fit your brand and audience.
influencersPage.whyCard4Desc: Real-time clicks and conversions in your dashboard—clear numbers, reliable attribution, and on-time payouts.
influencersPage.galleryLead: Creators across social platforms partner with Earnytics to grow affiliate revenue.

advertisers.heroDesc: Not on Earnytics yet? You're missing scale. Connect with quality publishers, pay only for performance, and track every sale in real time.
advertisers.howItWorksDesc: From sign-up to scale in four straightforward steps.
advertisers.readyToGrow: Ready to grow with performance marketing?
advertisers.featureScaleDesc: Connect with content sites, deal publishers, and creators who match your audience—without scaling junk traffic.
advertisers.featureTrackDesc: Real-time dashboards, publisher-level breakdowns, and fraud safeguards so your budget stays accountable.
advertisers.featurePartnerDesc: Run campaigns across social and editorial channels from a single advertiser workflow.
advertisers.featureOptimizeDesc: Double down on partners and placements that drive ROI with exports and APIs built for growth teams.
advertisers.programTypesIntro: Choose the compensation model that fits your business. We support all major affiliate and performance marketing structures.
advertisers.industriesIntro: From retail to SaaS, we help brands across sectors acquire customers through trusted publisher partnerships.
advertisers.millionsIntro: Earnytics gives you the ease to start, plus industry expertise and actionable data. Scale with a partner network built for performance.
advertisers.millionsIntro2: Whether you are a growing D2C brand or an established retailer, our network opens doors to new audiences without the risk of upfront ad spend. You scale only when you see results.
advertisers.sectionDareTitle: Dare to make the right choice
advertisers.sectionDareDesc: Connect with quality publishers and scale your affiliate program with real tracking and payouts.
advertisers.weDeliverPara1: Join a large network of affiliates and take your marketing to the next level with real tracking and payouts.
advertisers.weDeliverPara2: Our advertisers see measurable lifts in sales, traffic, and revenue when they partner with the right publishers. The numbers speak—we focus on transparency and long-term partnerships, not one-off campaigns.
advertisers.realRoiPara1: Unlike fixed CPM or CPC deals, affiliate marketing ties your spend directly to results. You pay only when a sale, lead, or install happens—so every dollar is accountable.
advertisers.realRoiPara2: Our platform gives you full visibility: real-time clicks, conversion tracking, and detailed reports by publisher and campaign. No black boxes, no guesswork. You see exactly who drives value and can double down on what works.

publishers.heroDesc: Join creators, bloggers, and influencers. Promote top brands, track every click, and get paid on time—no gatekeeping, no hassle.
publishers.howItWorksDesc: From sign-up to your first payout in four steps. No complex contracts—just sign up, pick offers, share links, and earn.
publishers.waysToEarn: Ways to earn as a publisher
publishers.publisherTools: Everything you need to promote & track
publishers.builtForEveryPublisher: Built for every type of publisher
publishers.readyToEarn: Ready to turn your traffic into earnings?
publishers.featureNetworkDesc: Connect with premium global advertisers and unlock higher-value campaigns.
publishers.featureMonetizeDesc: Monetize your content using our link tools to maximize earnings effortlessly.
publishers.featureCouponDesc: Generate promo codes to drive clicks, boost conversions, and grow your earnings.
publishers.featureAnalyticsDesc: Get real-time insights to track performance, understand revenue sources, and maximize your content earnings.

about.heroTitle: We connect brands with the right publishers and make payouts simple
about.heroDesc: Earnytics is a performance network built for clarity and results. Advertisers get quality traffic; publishers get fair pay and on-time payments. No fluff, no hidden terms.
about.inPerformanceMarketing: In performance marketing—we've seen what works
about.experiencePara1: The team behind Earnytics has run affiliate programs, managed publisher relationships, and built tracking systems for years. We started Earnytics because we wanted a network that actually respects both sides: advertisers who need results and publishers who deserve to get paid.
about.experiencePara2: We don't chase volume for the sake of it. Every publisher in the network is reviewed; every offer is vetted. Advertisers see where their budget goes, and publishers see exactly what they've earned and when they'll get it.
about.timelineIntro: We started small and focused on doing one thing well: connecting advertisers with publishers who deliver.
about.planIntro: We're constantly upgrading the platform: faster reporting, clearer dashboards, and payouts that land on time. The goal is simple—make it easier for advertisers to scale and for publishers to earn.
about.ctaDesc: Join as an advertiser or publisher. Free to sign up—you only pay or earn based on the deals you run. Real tracking, real payouts.
about.whoWeAreDesc: Built by affiliate and performance experts, Earnytics helps brands scale through results-driven partnerships—fair tracking, clear reporting, and payouts that land on time.
about.valuesInActionDesc: We believe in transparency and clean data. Our performance-led approach gives both sides visibility and turns engagement into real, measurable outcomes.
about.leadingNetworksLead: We work with major advertisers and ecosystem partners your audience already knows.
about.formSubmittedNote: Thanks — we'll get back to you soon.
